notes: Thin wrapper around Mathlib's Algebra.norm; all proofs are 1–4 lines delegating to map_one/map_mul/map_pow/norm_eq_zero_iff/norm_algebraMap. The only project-specific fact consumed is finrank_functionField_over_fracPolynomialX (degree 2 of the function-field extension). No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no long proofs.
